en: Everything had to run tight. It had to be perfect.
ko: 모든 것이 철저하게 진행되어야 했어. 완벽해야 했어.

en: What the fuck is that kid doing? What's he doing?
ko: 저 아이 뭐 하는 거야? 뭐 하고 있지?

en: Biggest IPO in this firm's history. What the fuck is he doing?
ko: 이 회사 역사상 가장 큰 IPO야. 저 아이 뭐 하는 거야?

en: Is he wearing a bow tie? Hi. How you doing? Good.
ko: 나비 넥타이를 매고 있네? 안녕. 잘 지내? 좋아.

en: Hey, did you clean the fishbowl?
I just... I had a minute and I... You had a minute? Yeah, I had a minute.
ko: 그냥... 잠깐 시간이 있어서... 너 잠깐 시간이 있었어? 응, 잠깐 시간이 있었어.

en: And today you needed to clean the fishbowl?
I finished my paperwork and I just had a couple of minutes.
ko: 서류 작업을 끝내고 몇 분 시간이 있었어.

en: A cock-sucking motherfucking new issue day?!
This is what happens when you fuck with your pets on new issue day!
ko: 새로운 발행일에 애완동물 가지고 장난치면 이렇게 되는 거야!
